headline: Ameren receives national accreditation for economic development capabilities
summary: Ameren has been recognized by the International Economic Development Council (IEDC) as one of 99 economic development organizations accredited as an Accredited Economic Development Organization (AEDO) – a comprehensive peer review process that measures economic development organizations against commonly held standards in the profession.

headline: Strength Seen in Ameren (AEE): Can Its 3.3% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: Ameren (AEE) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
